name: be1human--naruto-multi-agent-cn
description: Multi-agent dispatcher: main agent becomes a pure coordinator that delegates ALL real work to 5 persistent sub-agents via sessions_spawn with fixed sessionKeys. Round-robin scheduling, speak-before-spawn protocol, session reuse. Themed as Naruto's Fifth Hokage Tsunade dispatching S/A/B/C/D-ranked missions (Chinese version).
